corporate_income_tax_sme.label: 法人税 SME 2025 (資本金1億円以下)
corporate_income_tax_sme.notes: SME: ≤¥8M @ 19%, 超 @ 23.2% (資本金1億円以下)

corporate_income_tax_large.label: 法人税 大企業 2025
corporate_income_tax_large.notes: 大企業 (資本金1億円超): 一律23.2%

local_tax_estimate.label: 地方法人税+法人住民税+法人事業税 概算 2025
local_tax_estimate.notes: 国税額の概算10.7%（都道府県・市区町村により異なる）

resident_tax.label: 住民税 2025
resident_tax.notes: 住民税: 所得割10%フラット (道府県民税4% + 市町村民税6%)

consumption_tax_standard.label: 消費税 標準税率 2025
consumption_tax_standard.notes: 消費税標準税率10% (国税7.8% + 地方消費税2.2%)

consumption_tax_reduced.label: 消費税 軽減税率 2025
consumption_tax_reduced.notes: 軽減税率8%: 食料品・新聞等

social_insurance_employee.label: 社会保険 従業員負担 2025
social_insurance_employee.notes: 健保5% + 厚生年金9.15% (労使折半); 年金上限月65万円

social_insurance_employer.label: 社会保険 事業主負担 2025
social_insurance_employer.notes: 健保5% + 厚生年金9.15% (労使折半)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
